metadata.name: stablecoin
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard — modular stablecoin program with SSS-1 and SSS-2 presets

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Accept a pending authority transfer. Must be called by the pending authority.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The pending authority accepting the transfer.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

instructions.name: add_to_allowlist
docs: Add an address to the allowlist (SSS-3 only). Requires the blacklister role.
Only allowlisted addresses can send/receive tokens in allowlist mode.

accounts.name: blacklister
docs: The blacklister authority (manages both blacklist and allowlist).

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: allowlist_entry
docs: The allowlist entry PDA — existence means the address is allowed.

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Add an address to the blacklist (SSS-2 only). Requires the blacklister role.

accounts.name: blacklister
docs: The blacklister authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry PDA — existence means the address is blacklisted.

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: Burn stablecoin tokens from the caller's own token account.

accounts.name: burner
docs: The token holder burning their own tokens.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint.

accounts.name: burner_token_account
docs: The burner's token account.

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze a token account, preventing all transfers. Requires the freezer role.

accounts.name: freezer
docs: The freezer authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the freezer role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The token account to freeze.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize a new stablecoin with Token-2022 extensions based on params.
SSS-1: mint authority + freeze authority + metadata.
SSS-2: SSS-1 + permanent delegate + transfer hook.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The master authority for this stablecoin.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA — derived from the mint keypair.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin Token-2022 mint. A fresh keypair generated by the client.
Initialized via CPI for dynamic extension selection.
space for the selected extensions and initialize it with Token-2022.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration PDA.

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: The transfer hook program (required if enable_transfer_hook is true).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint new stablecoin tokens to a recipient. Requires an authorized minter with quota.

accounts.name: minter
docs: The minter executing this mint operation.

accounts.name: minter_config
docs: The minter's configuration PDA — tracks quota usage.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint.

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Recipient's token account.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pause all stablecoin operations globally. Requires the pauser role.

accounts.name: pauser
docs: The pauser authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the pauser role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

instructions.name: remove_from_allowlist
docs: Remove an address from the allowlist (SSS-3 only). Requires the blacklister role.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Receives rent from closing the allowlist entry.

accounts.name: blacklister
docs: The blacklister authority (manages both blacklist and allowlist).

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: allowlist_entry
docs: The allowlist entry PDA — closing it removes the address from the allowlist.

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Remove an address from the blacklist (SSS-2 only). Requires the blacklister role.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Receives rent from closing the blacklist entry.

accounts.name: blacklister
docs: The blacklister authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry PDA — closing it removes the address from the blacklist.

instructions.name: seize
docs: Seize tokens from an account using permanent delegate authority (SSS-2 only).
Transfers tokens from the target account to a treasury account.
Requires the seizer role.

accounts.name: seizer
docs: The seizer authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the seizer role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint (mutable for burn + mint operations).

accounts.name: from_token_account
docs: The source token account to seize tokens from.

accounts.name: to_token_account
docs: The treasury/destination token account to receive seized tokens.

instructions.name: thaw_account
docs: Thaw a previously frozen token account. Requires the freezer role.

accounts.name: freezer
docs: The freezer authority (same role handles thaw).

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the freezer role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin mint.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The token account to thaw.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Initiate a two-step authority transfer. Requires the current master authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current master authority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpause stablecoin operations. Requires the pauser role.

accounts.name: pauser
docs: The pauser authority.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration — validates the pauser role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

instructions.name: update_minter
docs: Create or update a minter's configuration (quota and active status).
Requires the master authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The master authority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: minter_config
docs: The minter configuration PDA — created if it doesn't exist.

instructions.name: update_roles
docs: Update role assignments (pauser, freezer, blacklister, seizer).
Requires the master authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The master authority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration.

accounts.name: roles
docs: Role configuration PDA.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required role

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance features are not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: TransferHookNotEnabled
errors.msg: Transfer hook is not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals: must be between 0 and 9

errors.name: AuthorityTransferPending
errors.msg: An authority transfer is already pending

errors.name: InvalidConfig
errors.msg: Invalid configuration: permanent delegate requires transfer hook

errors.name: AllowlistNotEnabled
errors.msg: Allowlist features are not enabled on this stablecoin

errors.name: AlreadyOnAllowlist
errors.msg: Address is already on the allowlist

errors.name: NotOnAllowlist
errors.msg: Address is not on the allowlist

types.name: AllowlistEntry
docs: An allowlist entry for a specific address (SSS-3).
Existence of this PDA means the address is allowed to transact.

fields.name: stablecoin_config
docs: The stablecoin config this entry belongs to.

fields.name: address
docs: The allowlisted address.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason for allowlisting (e.g., "KYC verified").

fields.name: allowlisted_at
docs: Unix timestamp when allowlisted.

fields.name: allowlisted_by
docs: Authority who allowlisted this address.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: A blacklist entry for a specific address (SSS-2).
Existence of this PDA means the address is blacklisted.

fields.name: stablecoin_config
docs: The stablecoin config this entry belongs to.

fields.name: address
docs: The blacklisted address.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason for blacklisting (e.g., "OFAC match").

fields.name: blacklisted_at
docs: Unix timestamp when blacklisted.

fields.name: blacklisted_by
docs: Authority who blacklisted this address.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: MinterConfig
docs: Per-minter configuration with quota tracking.

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter's public key.

fields.name: stablecoin_config
docs: The stablecoin config this minter belongs to.

fields.name: quota
docs: Maximum amount this minter is allowed to mint.

fields.name: minted
docs: Amount already minted by this minter.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this minter is active.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: RoleConfig
docs: Role assignments for operational functions.
Each role can be assigned to a different keypair.

fields.name: stablecoin_config
docs: The stablecoin config this role set belongs to.

fields.name: pauser
docs: Authority that can pause/unpause the stablecoin.

fields.name: freezer
docs: Authority that can freeze/thaw token accounts.

fields.name: blacklister
docs: Authority that can add/remove addresses from blacklist (SSS-2).

fields.name: seizer
docs: Authority that can seize tokens via permanent delegate (SSS-2).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: StablecoinConfig
docs: Global configuration for a stablecoin instance.
Stores authorities, feature flags, and operational state.

fields.name: master_authority
docs: Master authority — can update all roles and transfer authority.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority for two-step transfer. Pubkey::default() if none pending.

fields.name: mint
docs: The stablecoin Token-2022 mint address.

fields.name: decimals
docs: Decimal places for the stablecoin (typically 6).

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether permanent delegate extension is enabled (SSS-2).

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether transfer hook extension is enabled (SSS-2).

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Whether the stablecoin is globally paused.

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Cumulative amount minted across all minters.

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Cumulative amount burned.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: enable_confidential_transfer
docs: Whether confidential transfer extension is enabled (SSS-3).

fields.name: enable_allowlist
docs: Whether allowlist mode is enabled (SSS-3). Inverts blacklist logic:
only allowlisted addresses can send/receive.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved for future upgrades.
